title: centaurea pichleri
intro: Centaurea pichleri, also known as the mountain cornflower, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea pichleri include reducing pain and swelling, as well as aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. Centaurea pichleri can be prepared as an infusion or a tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and soothe irritated skin.
